description_long: This object represents an adult pedestrian figure, depicted with a naturalistic human form and proportions. The surface appears smooth and continuous, with no visible facial or anatomical details discernible from the images. The figure is upright, with a slightly forward-leaning posture, suggesting a walking or standing pose. The clothing is form-fitting and lacks distinct separations between upper and lower garments, giving the appearance of a single-piece outfit. There are no visible accessories, carried items, or distinguishing features such as hats or bags. The overall silhouette is streamlined, with no protruding elements or articulated limbs.
description: A smooth, upright adult pedestrian figure with a streamlined, form-fitting outfit and no visible accessories or detailed features.
description_view_0: The figure's upper body and head are partially visible, with a smooth, continuous surface and no distinct facial features.
description_view_1: The side of the figure is shown, highlighting the gentle curvature of the torso and the absence of detailed anatomical features.
description_view_2: A close-up of the figure's midsection, showing a uniform, untextured surface with no visible seams or accessories.
description_view_3: The lower body and legs are visible, maintaining the same smooth, featureless appearance as the rest of the figure.
